name: FineServe: A Fine-Grained Dataset and Characterization of Global LLM Serving Workloads
summary: arXiv:2607.19349v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as always-on online services, making efficient LLM serving a critical systems challenge. Achie...
description: arXiv:2607.19349v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as always-on online services, making efficient LLM serving a critical systems challenge. Achieving low latency and high throughput under volatile demand requires deep understanding of real-world serving workloads, yet existing studies often rely on proxy traces or coarse-grained characterizati...
author: Tiancheng Zhang, Shaoyuan Huang, Mingyuan Wang, Yunfeng Zhao, Xiaofei Wang, Wenyu Wang
